product and concept releases.title: work with codex from anywhere
product and concept releases.summary: unveiling a lightweight, offline-capable developer client that integrates openai codex predictions into custom terminal environments.
product and concept releases.author: codex team

product and concept releases.title: introducing google antigravity 2.0
product and concept releases.summary: announcing the next-generation antigravity sdk with native orchestration primitives, self-healing code loops, and multi-agent sandboxing.
product and concept releases.author: antigravity core team

product and concept releases.title: redesigning claude code on desktop for parallel agents
product and concept releases.summary: a revamped desktop client for claude code supporting concurrent, asynchronous agent streams solving multi-file programming tasks.
product and concept releases.author: anthropic developers

scientific breakthroughs.title: scaling how we build and test our most advanced ai
scientific breakthroughs.summary: meta shares details of its global compute infrastructure and custom benchmarking framework designed to evaluate trillion-parameter multimodal models.
scientific breakthroughs.author: meta infrastructure

scientific breakthroughs.title: new ai tools for the future of science
scientific breakthroughs.summary: google previews gemini-powered scientific aids specialized in biochemical structures, molecular simulation, and cross-discipline data retrieval.
scientific breakthroughs.author: google research

scientific breakthroughs.title: the "super weight:" how even a single parameter can determine a large language model's behavior
scientific breakthroughs.summary: apple machine learning researchers discover singular high-magnitude weights inside LLM matrices that control major downstream reasoning behaviors.
scientific breakthroughs.author: apple ml research

blog posts & news.title: widening the conversation on frontier ai
blog posts & news.summary: anthropic announces global public dialogue sessions to gather diverse citizen input on the alignment and safety thresholds of frontier models.
blog posts & news.author: anthropic policy

blog posts & news.title: testing ads in chatgpt
blog posts & news.summary: openai announces an experimental pilot program testing non-intrusive, contextually relevant sponsored recommendations within chatgpt conversations.

blog posts & news.summary: editorial summary of the google i/o 2026 keynote introducing advanced agentic coding standards and developer preview libraries.
